title: Suspicious phishing email targeting residents
description: Multiple residents reported receiving emails impersonating the local utility company asking for account credentials.
recommendedActions: Do not click links in suspicious emails
Report to local authorities
calmDescription: Multiple residents reported receiving emails impersonating the local utility company asking for account credentials.

title: Package stolen from front porch
description: A resident on Maple Street reported a package was taken from their porch around 2pm.
recommendedActions: Check doorbell camera footage
File a report with local police
calmDescription: A resident on Maple Street reported a package was taken from their porch around 2pm.

title: Neighborhood-wide internet outage
description: Internet service has been down for the entire Oak Park area since this morning.
recommendedActions: Contact your ISP
Check for outage updates on provider website
calmDescription: Internet service has been down for the entire Oak Park area since this morning.

title: Online marketplace scam reported
description: A resident paid for an item on an online marketplace but never received the product. The seller's account has since been deleted.
recommendedActions: File a dispute with your payment provider
Report the seller to the platform
calmDescription: A resident paid for an item on an online marketplace but never received the product. The seller's account has since been deleted.

title: Social media account compromised
description: A resident's social media account was taken over and used to send spam messages to their contacts.
recommendedActions: Change passwords on all accounts
Enable two-factor authentication
calmDescription: A resident's social media account was taken over and used to send spam messages to their contacts.

title: Suspicious person near school
description: A parent reported an unfamiliar individual loitering near the elementary school during pickup hours.
recommendedActions: Alert school administration
Contact local police non-emergency line
calmDescription: A parent reported an unfamiliar individual loitering near the elementary school during pickup hours.

title: Garage break-in on Cedar Lane
description: A homeowner discovered their garage had been broken into overnight. Tools and a bicycle were stolen.
recommendedActions: File a police report immediately
Check with neighbors for security camera footage
calmDescription: A homeowner discovered their garage had been broken into overnight. Tools and a bicycle were stolen.

title: Power outage affecting three blocks
description: Residents on Pine, Oak, and Birch streets have reported a complete power outage starting around 6am.
recommendedActions: Contact the power company
Avoid opening refrigerator to preserve food
calmDescription: Residents on Pine, Oak, and Birch streets have reported a complete power outage starting around 6am.

title: Fake charity solicitation calls
description: Several residents received phone calls from an organization claiming to collect donations for a local charity that does not exist.
recommendedActions: Do not provide personal or financial information
Report the number to the FTC
calmDescription: Several residents received phone calls from an organization claiming to collect donations for a local charity that does not exist.

title: Unusual Wi-Fi network appearing in neighborhood
description: Residents noticed a new open Wi-Fi network named 'Free_Internet_Elm' that may be a honeypot for capturing network traffic.
recommendedActions: Do not connect to unknown Wi-Fi networks
Use a VPN if you must use public networks
calmDescription: Residents noticed a new open Wi-Fi network named 'Free_Internet_Elm' that may be a honeypot for capturing network traffic.

title: Suspicious person near an elementary school
description: OMG I'm FREAKING OUT! there is a guy watching the kids and he's been here for over an hour!!!!
calmDescription: A person has been observed in the vicinity of the elementary school for approximately one hour. The individual appeared to be watching the children. The situation has been reported for appropriate follow-up by authorities.
recommendedActions: Contact local police non-emergency line
Document details such as time, appearance, and vehicle
Alert neighbors through community channels

title: A person is stalking me in the park
description: THERE IS A person STALKIING ME for over an HOUR!!!!! Please watch out!!!!
calmDescription: A person has been following me in the park for approximately one hour. Please be aware of your surroundings.
recommendedActions: Contact local police non-emergency line
Document details such as time, appearance, and vehicle
Alert neighbors through community channels

title: someone is following me
description: SOMEONE is following me on grant street!! Please watch out, he's been stalking me for over an hour!!!
calmDescription: Someone is following me on Grant Street. This person has been following me for over an hour. Please be aware of this situation.
recommendedActions: Contact local police non-emergency line
Document details such as time, appearance, and vehicle
Alert neighbors through community channels

title: A cat was on a. tree
description: A cat is on the tree near grant street!!!!! PLEASE HELPP!!
calmDescription: A cat has been observed in a tree near Grant Street and requires assistance for safe removal.
recommendedActions: Document all relevant details
Report to local authorities if applicable
Monitor the situation and report updates
